documentation.description:
ESC information for lower rate streaming. Recommended streaming rate 1Hz.
See ESC_STATUS for higher-rate ESC data.

record_types.name: Esc_Info

fields.name: Index
fields.description:
Index of the first ESC in this message (ESC are indexed in motor
order). minValue = 0, maxValue = 60, increment = 4.

fields.name: Time_Usec
fields.description:
Units: [us]
Timestamp (UNIX Epoch time or time since system boot). The receiving
end can infer timestamp format (since 1.1.1970 or since system boot)
by checking for the magnitude the number.

fields.name: Count
fields.description:
Total number of ESCs in all messages of this type. Message fields
with an index higher than this should be ignored because they
contain invalid data.

fields.name: Connection_Type
fields.description: Connection type protocol for all ESC.

fields.name: Info
fields.description: Information regarding online/offline status of each ESC.

fields.name: Error_Count
fields.description: Number of reported errors by each ESC since boot.

fields.name: Temperature
fields.description:
Units: [cdegC]
Temperature of each ESC. INT16_MAX: if data not supplied by ESC.
